channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Pop Queen Thalia On Her Groundbreaking Career And Inspiring Latin’s Next Generation
item.description:
[Energetic music plays in the background]
Host: Welcome to this special episode, where we're celebrating the incredible career of the one and only Thalia. By the time she was in her early 20s, Thalia was already a global superstar, starring in the hit "María Trilogy" of telenovelas that aired in over 180 countries to a massive audience of nearly 2 billion people.
[Soft music transition]
Host: But Thalia's rise to fame wasn't without its challenges. She started her career as a child, and by the time she was a teenager, she was already struggling with the pressures of fame. As she recalls, "I was surviving back then... I was going through pain, tears, and doubting myself." Despite these struggles, Thalia has become a powerful and resilient woman, inspiring countless fans around the world.
[Upbeat music returns]
Host: With an impressive 41 entries on Billboard's Latin Pop Airplay chart, Thalia is a true legend in the music industry. She's collaborated with emerging Latin acts like Maluma, Prince Royce, and Natti Natasha, bridging generations and supporting the next wave of talent. As she says, "It's kind of like a mission for me... We have to look after each other, we have to protect each other. It's a big family."
[Short clip of "Te Perdiste Mi Amor" plays]
Host: Prince Royce, who collaborated with Thalia on the hit track "Te Perdiste Mi Amor," praises her energy and passion, saying "Every time I see her, she's full of energy and always has a big smile on her face." Thalia's impact on the music industry is undeniable, and her legacy continues to inspire new artists and fans alike.
[Closing music plays]
Host: That's all for today's episode. Join us on April 29 for Billboard's Women in Music 2026, live on YouTube and Billboard.com. And don't forget to check out more coverage on Women in Music on our website. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next episode!
